columns.flow_type: Controlled task flow category, not a raw URL.
columns.scenario_type: Specific UX friction scenario simulated by the dummy website.
columns.network_condition: fast, normal, or slow controlled test context.
columns.task_completed: 1 if the target task reached success state, otherwise 0.
columns.task_failed: 1 if task was not completed, otherwise 0.
columns.retry_count: Recovery attempts after failure, obstruction, validation, or wrong path.
columns.failed_clicks: Clicks on fake, disabled, blocked, or failed controls.
columns.unnecessary_clicks: Clicks not required for the ideal task path.
columns.path_deviation_score: 0-10 score measuring deviation from the expected path.
columns.page_load_time_ms: Navigation load event timing from browser Performance API.
columns.dom_content_loaded_ms: DOM content loaded timing from browser Performance API.
columns.time_to_first_byte_ms: Response-start timing from browser Performance API.
columns.feedback_delay_ms: Time from user action to visible status feedback.
columns.interaction_to_next_paint_ms: Measured delay from interaction to next rendered frame/event duration.
columns.error_message_present: 1 if an error message is visible or detected.
columns.popup_detected: 1 if a popup/modal is present during the run.
columns.cookie_banner_detected: 1 if a cookie banner is present during the run.
columns.overlay_blocks_cta: 1 if an overlay blocks the target CTA.
columns.friction_score: Weighted scoring value used for label assignment.
columns.friction_level: Final target label: Low, Medium, or High.
